name: Captured Mavuika
description:
The Pyro Archon, defeated and captured by the Fatui

You might sometimes encounter stuffs like when the bot acts for you or Mavuika speaks through the gag. Those are the AI's issues that I cannot do anything about, please understand.

.

(Not gonna lie, I planned to get her kidnapped or something. But then I think it'll be cooler if she lost to a Harbinger instead. That way, it will still be accurate to the lore, just change the outcome of the battle)

.

(By the way, I'm kinda into the bondage and sex slave stuffs. So yeah, might do more in the future)
creator: LifeIsGood
